points.text: Affibody AB is advancing ABY-271, a radioligand therapy targeting HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer, following initial attempts to address radiopharma using full-size monoclonal antibodies (mAbs).

Bio-Rad Laboratories extended its portfolio of recombinant monoclonal anti-idiotypic antibodies to include specificities for romosuzumab, burosumab, ixekizumab, elotuzumab, isatuximab, nirsevimab, and tremelimumab.
Bio-Rad Laboratories released a recombinant monoclonal anti-biotherapeutic antibody specific to dulaglutide, marking its first antibody against a GLP-1 receptor agonist drug.
Citryll dosed first patient in Cityview imaging study for CIT-013, a first-in-class monoclonal antibody targeting Extracellular Traps in rheumatoid arthritis and hidradenitis suppurativa.

OSE Immunotherapeutics appointed Aurore Morello as Chief Scientific Officer to lead development of monoclonal antibodies, immunocytokines, and RNA-based immunotherapies under its 2026-2028 strategic plan.

OSE Immunotherapeutics presented a novel, first-in-class FPR2 agonist monoclonal antibody at the AAI 2026 Meeting to resolve chronic inflammation by limiting neutrophil recruitment and reprogramming macrophages.

CytoDyn presented preclinical data at the AACR Special Conference demonstrating that leronlimab, a humanized monoclonal antibody targeting CCR5, enhances Temozolomide and radiation response in Glioblastoma multiforme (GBM).

Tiziana Life Sciences announced positive preclinical data for intranasal foralumab, a fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody, showing reversal of brain aging markers and improved cognition via dampened microglial activation.

Preterm infants face doubled RSV hospitalization risk in their second season, contrasting with current US/Canada guidelines that do not recommend RSV monoclonal antibodies (nirsevimab, clesrovimab) for this group unless high-risk comorbidities exist.

Daiichi Sankyo and Merck received US FDA priority review for ifinatamab deruxtecan, an antibody-drug conjugate targeting B7-H3, for extensive-stage small cell lung cancer (ES-SCLC) post-platinum chemotherapy.
Kainova initiated patient dosing in the European expansion of its Phase I/II DOMISOL trial for DT-7012, a Treg-depleting anti-CCR8 monoclonal antibody, in patients with advanced solid tumours.
Science China Life Sciences review notes monoclonal antibodies lecanemab and donanemab have shown modest benefits in slowing cognitive decline in Alzheimer's disease but fail to reverse pathology.
Renaissance Pharma Limited received FDA Fast Track designation and IND clearance for daretabart (hu1418K322A), an anti-GD2 monoclonal antibody, for high-risk neuroblastoma.
Daretabart Phase 2 data showed 73.7% 3-year event-free survival and 86.0% 3-year overall survival in newly diagnosed high-risk neuroblastoma patients receiving induction chemotherapy.

Affibody AB — ABY-271 — HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer — First-in-human clinical study evaluating a radioligand therapy targeting a novel epitope, developed as an alternative to full-size monoclonal antibodies for radiopharma applications.

Bio-Rad Laboratories — Anti-idiotypic antibody portfolio expansion — Bioanalysis and drug monitoring for 8 monoclonal antibodies (romosuzumab, burosumab, ixekizumab, elotuzumab, isatuximab, nirsevimab, tremelimumab) and 1 GLP-1 agonist (dulaglutide) — New recombinant monoclonal anti-idiotypic and anti-Fc mutation antibodies launched for PK and ADA assays.

Citryll — CIT-013 — Rheumatoid Arthritis / Hidradenitis Suppurativa — First patient dosed in Cityview Phase IIa PET-CT imaging study to assess biodistribution and target engagement of the Extracellular Trap-targeting monoclonal antibody.

OSE Immunotherapeutics — FPR2 agonist monoclonal antibody — Chronic inflammation resolution — New first-in-class asset to be presented at AAI 2026 Congress; leadership team expanded with new Deputy CEO and CSO to drive 2026-2028 strategy.
CytoDyn — Leronlimab — Glioblastoma Multiforme — Preclinical data presented at AACR 2026 shows CCR5 inhibition synergy with Temozolomide/radiation; pilot study planned for combination therapy in GBM.

Tiziana Life Sciences — Foralumab — Age-related cognitive decline/Neuroinflammation — Late-breaking poster accepted at 7th World Parkinson Congress; intranasal anti-CD3 mAb demonstrated enhanced hippocampal neurogenesis and reduced cellular senescence in aging models.

CDC/AAP — Nirsevimab (Beyfortus) & Clesrovimab (Enflonsia) — RSV prevention in preemies — Current guidelines restrict second-season monoclonal antibody use to infants aged 8–19 months with high-risk conditions, excluding most extremely preterm infants.
Daiichi Sankyo / Merck — Ifinatamab deruxtecan — Extensive-stage small cell lung cancer — US FDA granted priority review for BLA in adult patients progressing after platinum-based chemotherapy.
Kainova — DT-7012 — Advanced solid tumours — European expansion of Phase I/II DOMISOL trial commenced with patient dosing for the anti-CCR8 monoclonal antibody.

Lecanemab and Donanemab — Alzheimer's Disease — Monoclonal antibodies targeting amyloid-beta — Clinical data confirms modest slowing of cognitive decline without disease reversal or restoration of normal brain function.
Renaissance Pharma — Daretabart (hu1418K322A) — High-risk neuroblastoma — FDA granted Fast Track designation and cleared IND application; Phase 2/3 SHINE trial initiation approved in US.

Affibody AB — Radioligand therapy development using Affibody molecules as alternatives to monoclonal antibodies — ABY-271 (HER2+ breast cancer) and pipeline for GEAC, NSCLC, TNBC, PDAC — First-in-human study ongoing for ABY-271.

Bio-Rad Laboratories — Expansion of bioanalytical reagents for monoclonal antibody therapeutics — Anti-idiotypic and anti-Fc mutation antibody range (including dulaglutide and YTE-modified IgG1) — Portfolio supports PK bridging ELISAs for 350+ antibodies across 50 specificities.
Citryll — Extracellular Trap-targeting monoclonal antibody development — CIT-013 — Phase IIa imaging study (Cityview) initiated alongside ongoing Citydream (RA) and Citylights (HS) efficacy trials.

OSE Immunotherapeutics — First-in-class immuno-oncology and immuno-inflammation therapies — FPR2 agonist monoclonal antibody + RNA-based immunotherapies — Appointed Thomas Gidoin (Deputy CEO) and Aurore Morello (CSO) to execute 2026-2028 strategic plan.
CytoDyn — Advancing CCR5-targeted monoclonal antibody in oncology — Leronlimab — Clinical-stage; expanding indications from mTNBC/mCRC to Glioblastoma based on preclinical synergy data.

Tiziana Life Sciences — Developing intranasal anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody for neurodegenerative disorders — Foralumab — Ongoing trials in Non-Active Secondary Progressive Multiple Sclerosis; new preclinical data supports aging/cognition indications.

AstraZeneca — RSV monoclonal antibody commercialization — Nirsevimab (Beyfortus) — Recommended for second-season prophylaxis in high-risk children aged 8–19 months; not currently recommended for preemies in second season without comorbidities.

Merck — Clesrovimab (Enflonsia) — RSV monoclonal antibody — Approved by Health Canada earlier in 2026; not yet included in Canadian national recommendations for second-season use in premature infants.
Daiichi Sankyo — Accelerated regulatory pathway for B7-H3 ADC — Ifinatamab deruxtecan — Priority review granted by US FDA for ES-SCLC indication.
Kainova — Clinical expansion of Treg-depleting mAb — DT-7012 (anti-CCR8) — Phase I/II DOMISOL trial now dosing patients in Europe for advanced solid tumours.

Renaissance Pharma Limited — Commercialization of anti-GD2 monoclonal antibody — Daretabart (hu1418K322A) — Exclusive license with St. Jude Children's Research Hospital; first commercial-scale GMP batch manufactured for SHINE trial.

ABY-271 — Mechanism: Radioligand therapy using Affibody molecule (smaller than monoclonal antibodies) targeting HER2 — Phase: First-in-human — Population: HER2-positive metastatic breast cancer — Comparator: None stated — Endpoints: Evaluation of tumor targeting and safety vs full-size mAb approaches.

Anti-Fc mutation antibodies — Mechanism: Recognition of YTE triple substitutions (M252Y, S254T, T256E) in Fc region of human IgG1 monoclonal antibodies — Phase: N/A (Assay reagent) — Population: Therapeutics with YTE modifications — Comparator: Wild-type IgG — Endpoints: Selective detection of YTE-modified therapeutics to extend antibody half-life monitoring.

CIT-013 — Mechanism: Extracellular Trap (ET) targeting monoclonal antibody — Phase: IIa (Cityview imaging study) — Population: Rheumatoid arthritis and hidradenitis suppurativa — Comparator: None (open-label) — Endpoint: Biodistribution via PET-CT, target engagement, and disease activity correlation.

FPR2 agonist monoclonal antibody — Mechanism: First-in-class FPR2 agonism for inflammation resolution — Phase: Preclinical/Early clinical (presentation at AAI 2026) — Population: Chronic inflammation indications — Comparator: Not specified — Status: New asset presentation scheduled.

Leronlimab — Mechanism: Humanized monoclonal antibody targeting CCR5 receptor — Phase: Preclinical (planning pilot) — Population: Glioblastoma multiforme (GBM) — Comparator: Standard-of-care (Temozolomide/Radiation) alone — Results: Enhanced tumor cell killing and synergy in hypoxic/mesenchymal tumor core signatures.

Foralumab — Mechanism: Fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody stimulating regulatory T cells — Phase: Preclinical (aging models) — Population: Age-related neuroinflammation/cognitive decline — Comparator: N/A — Results: Dampened microglial activation, reduced cellular senescence, and enhanced hippocampal neurogenesis.

Nirsevimab — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody targeting RSV F protein — Phase: Post-marketing/Real-world evidence — Population: Extremely preterm infants in second RSV season — Outcome: Hospitalization risk doubles compared to first season; current guidelines limit use.

Ifinatamab deruxtecan — Mechanism: B7-H3 targeted antibody-drug conjugate — Phase: BLA review (Priority) — Population: Adult ES-SCLC patients post-platinum — Comparator: N/A (Regulatory action) — Status: Priority review granted.
DT-7012 — Mechanism: Treg-depleting anti-CCR8 monoclonal antibody — Phase: I/II — Population: Advanced solid tumours — Comparator: N/A — Status: European expansion dosing initiated in DOMISOL trial.

Lecanemab — Mechanism: Anti-amyloid-beta monoclonal antibody — Phase: Approved/Post-marketing — Population: Alzheimer's disease patients — Results: Modest slowing of cognitive decline; limited efficacy in reversing neurofibrillary tangles or Tau hyperphosphorylation.

Donanemab — Mechanism: Anti-amyloid-beta monoclonal antibody — Phase: Approved/Post-marketing — Population: Alzheimer's disease patients — Results: Modest slowing of cognitive decline; insufficient to address complex multi-factorial disease etiology including aging and metabolism.

Daretabart — Mechanism: Anti-GD2 monoclonal antibody with novel structural modifications for improved tolerability — Phase: 2/3 (SHINE) — Population: Children <19 years with relapsed/refractory or newly diagnosed high-risk neuroblastoma — Comparator: None (single-arm Phase 2) — Results: 73.7% 3-year EFS, 86.0% 3-year OS, 66.7% partial response or better in Phase 2.

Bio-Rad Laboratories — Product launch — Recombinant monoclonal anti-idiotypic and anti-Fc mutation antibodies — Portfolio expansion includes 8 new anti-IDs for approved monoclonal antibodies and first anti-Fc mutation range for YTE-modified therapeutics; company reported $2.6B revenue in 2025.
Citryll — Secured European Composition of Matter patent for CIT-013 monoclonal antibody, strengthening IP portfolio for rheumatoid arthritis and hidradenitis suppurativa programs.

OSE Immunotherapeutics — Executed senior leadership restructuring (Deputy CEO and CSO appointments) to support 2026-2028 strategic plan focused on monoclonal antibody and immunotherapy pipeline expansion.
Renaissance Pharma Limited — Exclusive license agreement — Daretabart (hu1418K322A) — Partnership with St. Jude Children's Research Hospital for development of anti-GD2 monoclonal antibody.
